page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A Python3 annotation program to select the best gene model in each locus
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A lightweight Python3 pipeline whose purpose is to facilitate the identification of expressed loci from RNA-Seq data and to select the best models in each locus.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A lightweight Python3 pipeline whose purpose is to facilitate the identification of expressed loci from RNA-Seq data and to select the best models in each locus.
